title: crotalaria brachycarpa
intro: Crotalaria brachycarpa, also known as the small pod bush, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria brachycarpa is typically used in the form of decoctions or infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for various health conditions.
